system.effect:
Effect 2, then swap places with an adjacent foe. You may steal up to one (4+) two or (6+) three positive status tokens from them. If they have no positive tokens when you would steal a token, gain haste instead.
Gambit: (1-3) stun yourself and end your turn (4-5): Your foe is additionally blinded and takes 2 damage (6+): Gain the (4-5) effect, and you may repeat the base effect of this ability again, targeting a different foe.
